text:
Nishka Chotai Prad Biswas Do we have examples of Merge customers that use our Workday integration, and were then able to become Workday Preferred Partners with us powering the integration?
A prospect of mine wants to ensure that using a Merge powered integration doesn't impede them to being a UKG and/or Workday partner?

replies.text: Jemma Baus iirc FirstUp did and you may have other customers who have, right?
Tim Patag I think CSMs would know or Pritak Patel
I saw that Tilt, Unily, OC Tanner, Workhuman, Firstup, and eduMe are in the Workday Partner program.
Oh god
It's really not easy and honestly, it would be great to get some partnerships help on it because it's a lot of work
But I have this mapping sheet that's required for the immigration.
Any idea if its the same using Merge to power the integration vs. them building direct to get a partnership?
They can use us to power the integration but workday has to approve our integration
So it's a lot of back-and-forth between us and customers being like this is how we map X field, etc.
Hmm how does workday approve the integration?
We fill out a bunch of stuff for the customer, but it has to come from the customer
Sg sg - is UKG any different?

Basically workday gives our customers all these different certifications and requirements. Typically the questions about the integrations are how do we map certain fields and we just answer that for them.
Sry Jemma Baus quick follow up - but is it the same process for UKG?
um i think we have a pretty tight partnership with UKG, so i dont know
like they know us
workday.. doesnt
